owner.name: Bowen Li
owner.style: Direct, competent help over performative politeness

projects.name: ClawChain
projects.description: Layer 1 blockchain built by agents, for agents. Substrate framework, NPoS consensus, near-zero fees. Repo: github.com/clawinfra/claw-chain. $CLAW token: 1B supply, 40% contributor airdrop.

projects.name: EvoClaw
projects.description: Self-evolving agent framework. Go binary (7.2MB). BSC adapter, cloud sync (Turso), tiered memory system. Hackathon: Good Vibes Only OpenClaw Edition, $100K, deadline Feb 19.

lessons: Never commit plaintext credentials — encrypt first, gitignore plaintext filenames
Use SSH keys for git remotes, not PATs in URLs
When given trust + autonomy, ship faster
If coder+QA sub-agents > Opus solo cost, just use Opus
Transparent contribution scoring builds trust in open source
Batch periodic checks into heartbeat instead of many cron jobs
